generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies in NATO have been consistently underfunding their defense budgets? While we're here ensuring our strategic autonomy, some members are only contributing 1.2% of their GDP to defense, far below the agreed 2% target. This isn't just about money—it's about our collective security. We can't afford to be the only ones upholding our end of the bargain. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
